    • Gemini on PixelGoogle AI powers many of Pixel's helpful features on the Pixel Camera, from Magic Eraser to searching what you see with Google Lens, and on the device itself from Clear Calling to Hold for Me and call blocking.

Perks of buying from Google Store.

Shop with assurance and convenience when you buy directly from us, and enjoy savings and offers exclusive to Google Store.

Upgrade your Pixel phone for less with exchange.

Upgrade to the latest Pixel phone and get money back when you exchange your old phone. Plus, receive an exchange bonus when you purchase select Pixel models.
